record.field: Learn Python from scratch with hands-on examples and real-world projects

Course Overview

Master the fundamentals of Python programming in this comprehensive course designed for beginners.

What You'll Learn:

  • Python syntax and basic programming concepts
  • Variables, data types, and operators
  • Control flow: if statements, loops
  • Functions and modules
  • Data structures: lists, dictionaries, sets, tuples
  • Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
  • File handling and exceptions
  • Working with libraries and packages

Prerequisites:

No prior programming experience required! Just bring your enthusiasm to learn.

Course Duration:

Approximately 8 hours of video content + hands-on exercises
Complete guide to Odoo module development from basics to advanced

Become an Odoo Expert

This comprehensive course covers everything you need to know about Odoo development.

Topics Covered:

  • Odoo Framework Architecture
  • Model Development (ORM, fields, methods)
  • View Development (XML, QWeb)
  • Security and Access Rights
  • Controllers and HTTP Routes
  • JavaScript and OWL Framework
  • Reports and Wizards
  • Best Practices and OCA Guidelines

Prerequisites:

Python Programming Fundamentals (or equivalent knowledge)
Master project management fundamentals and Agile methodologies

Essential Project Management Skills

Learn the core principles and practices of effective project management.

Course Content:

  • Project Management Fundamentals
  • Agile and Scrum Framework
  • Planning and Scheduling
  • Risk Management
  • Team Leadership
  • Communication Strategies
Modern JavaScript from basics to advanced concepts

Master Modern JavaScript

Learn JavaScript ES6+ features and modern web development practices.

What You'll Learn:

  • JavaScript Fundamentals
  • ES6+ Features (arrow functions, destructuring, modules)
  • Asynchronous JavaScript (Promises, async/await)
  • DOM Manipulation
  • Working with APIs
  • Modern Frameworks Overview
Learn database design principles and SQL from beginner to advanced

Master Database Design and SQL

Comprehensive course on relational databases and SQL.

Topics:

  • Database Design Principles
  • Normalization
  • SQL Basics (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
  • Joins and Subqueries
  • Indexes and Performance
  • PostgreSQL Specific Features
Learn the essentials of digital marketing and online strategies

Digital Marketing Essentials

Master the fundamentals of digital marketing in today's online world.

Course Modules:

  • Digital Marketing Overview
  • SEO and Content Marketing
  • Social Media Marketing
  • Email Marketing
  • Analytics and Metrics

Welcome to the Python Programming Fundamentals course!

In this introductory video, you'll learn:

  • What is Python and why learn it?
  • Python's applications in real world
  • Course structure and learning path

What You Will Learn

This comprehensive course covers:

  • Module 1: Introduction and Setup
  • Module 2: Python Basics (variables, data types, operators)
  • Module 3: Control Flow (if/else, loops)
  • Module 4: Functions and Modules
  • Module 5: Data Structures
  • Module 6: Object-Oriented Programming

Prerequisites

No prior programming experience required! Just bring:

  • A computer with internet connection
  • Willingness to learn and practice
  • Curiosity and problem-solving mindset

Learning Approach

This course uses a hands-on approach with:

  • Video lectures explaining concepts
  • Code examples and demonstrations
  • Practice exercises after each module
  • Quizzes to test your understanding

Setting Up Your Python Environment

Follow this step-by-step guide to install Python and set up your development environment.

Windows Installation:

  1. Download Python from python.org
  2. Run the installer (check "Add Python to PATH")
  3. Verify installation: python --version

Recommended Tools:

  • VS Code: Lightweight code editor
  • PyCharm: Full-featured Python IDE
  • Jupyter Notebook: Interactive coding environment

Understanding Variables and Data Types

Learn the foundation of Python programming:

Topics Covered:

  • Variables: How to create and use variables
  • Integers: Whole numbers (1, 42, -10)
  • Floats: Decimal numbers (3.14, -0.5)
  • Strings: Text data ("Hello", 'Python')
  • Booleans: True/False values
  • Type Conversion: Converting between types

Code Examples:


# Variables
name = "John"
age = 25
height = 1.75
is_student = True

# Type conversion
age_str = str(age)  # "25"
price = float("19.99")  # 19.99

Python Operators

Arithmetic Operators:

  • + Addition
  • - Subtraction
  • * Multiplication
  • / Division
  • // Floor Division
  • % Modulus
  • ** Exponentiation

Comparison Operators:

  • == Equal to
  • != Not equal to
  • > Greater than
  • < Less than
  • >= Greater than or equal
  • <= Less than or equal

Logical Operators:

  • and - Both conditions must be True
  • or - At least one condition must be True
  • not - Reverses the boolean value

String Manipulation in Python

Master string operations and methods:

  • String concatenation and formatting
  • String methods (upper, lower, strip, split)
  • String slicing and indexing
  • F-strings for modern formatting

Test your understanding of Python basics!

This quiz covers variables, data types, operators, and strings.

Conditional Statements

Learn how to make decisions in your code:

  • if statements
  • if-else statements
  • elif (else if) statements
  • Nested conditions
  • Ternary operators

Iteration with Loops

Master looping constructs:

  • for loops and range()
  • while loops
  • break and continue statements
  • Loop else clause
  • Nested loops
Test your knowledge of if-else statements and loops!

Functions in Python

Learn to write reusable code with functions:

  • Defining functions with def
  • Parameters and arguments
  • Return values
  • Default parameters
  • *args and **kwargs
  • Lambda functions

Modules and Packages

Organize your code effectively:

  • Importing modules
  • Creating your own modules
  • Understanding __name__ == "__main__"
  • Working with packages
  • Standard library overview

Python Lists

Master the most versatile data structure:

  • Creating and accessing lists
  • List methods (append, extend, insert, remove)
  • List slicing
  • List comprehensions
  • Nested lists

Dictionaries and Sets

Learn key-value pairs and unique collections:

  • Dictionary basics
  • Dictionary methods
  • Dictionary comprehensions
  • Sets and set operations
  • When to use each data structure

Understanding Tuples

Learn about immutable sequences:

  • Creating tuples
  • Tuple packing and unpacking
  • When to use tuples vs lists
  • Named tuples

Introduction to OOP

Learn object-oriented programming concepts:

  • Classes and objects
  • Attributes and methods
  • __init__ constructor
  • self parameter
  • Instance vs class variables

Advanced OOP Concepts

Master inheritance and polymorphism:

  • Inheritance basics
  • Method overriding
  • super() function
  • Multiple inheritance
  • Polymorphism

Comprehensive final quiz covering all course topics!

Test your mastery of Python fundamentals.
What is the correct way to declare a variable in Python?
This is C/Java syntax, not Python!
Which data type is mutable in Python?
Correct! Lists can be modified after creation.
What is the output of: print(type(3.14))?
3.14 is a decimal number, not an integer.
This would be the type if it was in quotes: "3.14"
What is the correct syntax for an if statement in Python?
Python doesn't use curly braces for blocks.
Correct! Python uses colon and indentation.
Which loop is used when you know the number of iterations?
While loops are better for unknown iterations.
Correct! For loops are ideal for known iterations.
What does the 'break' statement do in a loop?
What is the purpose of the __init__ method in a Python class?
Which method is used to add an element to the end of a list?
add() is used for sets, not lists.
Correct! append() adds to the end of a list.
push() is used in other languages, not Python.

Welcome to Odoo Development

Introduction to the Odoo framework and ecosystem.

  • What is Odoo?
  • Odoo architecture overview
  • Development environment setup

Odoo Framework Architecture

Understanding the MVC pattern in Odoo:

Three-Tier Architecture:

  • Models: Business logic and data structure (Python)
  • Views: User interface (XML, QWeb)
  • Controllers: HTTP request handling (Python)

Key Components:

  • ORM: Object-Relational Mapping for database operations
  • PostgreSQL: Database backend
  • QWeb: Template engine for reports and views
  • Security Framework: Access rights and record rules
  • Workflow Engine: Business process automation

Module Structure:


my_module/
├── __init__.py
├── __manifest__.py
├── models/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   └── my_model.py
├── views/
│   └── my_model_views.xml
├── security/
│   ├── ir.model.access.csv
│   └── security.xml
└── data/
    └── data.xml

Creating Odoo Models

Learn how to create models using the Odoo ORM:

Topics Covered:

  • Model definition and inheritance
  • Field types (Char, Integer, Many2one, One2many, Many2many)
  • Field attributes (required, readonly, default)
  • Computed fields with @api.depends
  • Onchange methods
  • Constraints and validations

Example:


from odoo import models, fields, api

class MyModel(models.Model):
    _name = 'my.model'
    _description = 'My Model'
    
    name = fields.Char(string='Name', required=True)
    date = fields.Date(string='Date')
    amount = fields.Float(string='Amount')
    partner_id = fields.Many2one('res.partner', string='Partner')

Creating Views in Odoo

Master XML view development:

  • Form views
  • Tree (list) views
  • Kanban views
  • Search views
  • Calendar and graph views
  • View inheritance

Odoo Security Framework

Access Rights (ir.model.access.csv):

Define CRUD permissions for groups:


id,name,model_id:id,group_id:id,perm_read,perm_write,perm_create,perm_unlink
access_my_model_user,my.model.user,model_my_model,base.group_user,1,1,1,0
access_my_model_manager,my.model.manager,model_my_model,base.group_system,1,1,1,1

Record Rules (ir.rule):

Row-level security with domain filters:


<record id="my_model_rule" model="ir.rule">
    <field name="name">My Model: User can only see own records</field>
    <field name="model_id" ref="model_my_model"/>
    <field name="domain_force">[('user_id', '=', user.id)]</field>
    <field name="groups" eval="[(4, ref('base.group_user'))]"/>
</record>

Field-Level Security:

  • groups attribute on fields
  • Conditional visibility

HTTP Controllers in Odoo

Learn to create web endpoints:

  • @http.route decorator
  • Request types (http, json)
  • Authentication (public, user)
  • Rendering QWeb templates
  • JSON-RPC endpoints

Frontend Development with OWL

Master Odoo's JavaScript framework:

  • OWL (Odoo Web Library) basics
  • Creating custom widgets
  • Component lifecycle
  • RPC calls from JavaScript
  • Extending existing views

JavaScript Basics

Learn the fundamentals of JavaScript programming.

Modern JavaScript Features

Learn ES6+ features:

  • Arrow functions
  • Destructuring
  • Template literals
  • Modules
  • Promises and async/await

SQL Basics

Learn SQL commands:

  • SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
  • WHERE clauses
  • JOINs
  • Aggregate functions

PM Basics

Learn the fundamentals of project management.

Agile Methodology

Understanding Agile principles:

  • Scrum Framework
  • Sprint Planning
  • Daily Standups
  • Retrospectives

Digital Marketing Overview

Learn the basics of digital marketing.

SEO Fundamentals

Learn search engine optimization:

  • Keyword research
  • On-page SEO
  • Link building
  • Content strategy
Excellent course! Very well structured and easy to follow. The hands-on examples really helped me understand Python concepts.
Great content overall, but would love more practical examples and exercises.
Perfect for beginners! The instructor explains everything clearly.
Comprehensive Odoo development course. Covers everything from basics to advanced topics!
Good introduction to digital marketing. Would like more case studies.
Best SQL course I've taken! Clear explanations and practical examples.
Great introduction! Looking forward to the rest of the course.
Very clear explanation. Thanks for making this course!
The examples really helped me understand data types. Could you add more examples about type conversion?
Excellent overview of Odoo architecture! The MVC explanation was very helpful.
Can someone explain the difference between @api.depends and @api.onchange?
Great start to JavaScript! The examples are easy to follow.
